China’s Car Sales Slump as Gasoline Demand Craters
headlines.summary: Car sales in China fell by 21.5% in April, driven by lower demand for gasoline-powered vehicles amid higher fuel prices. headlines.title: Modi Urges Indians to Conserve Fuel as Oil Shock Spreads
headlines.summary: India’s Prime Minister called on the nation to work from home, travel less, and conserve fuel to help the government save foreign exchange. “In the current situation, we must place great emphasis on saving foreign exchange,” Narendra Modi said, as quoted by Reuters. headlines.title: Oil Tankers Go Dark to Exit the Strait of Hormuz
headlines.summary: Three supertankers laden with crude oil successfully exited the Strait of Hormuz last week, carrying Iraqi and Emirati oil, Reuters has reported, citing data from Kpler and LSEG. headlines.title: Oil Prices Surge After Trump Rejects Iran Peace Offer
headlines.summary: Oil prices spiked in early Asian trade on Monday after President Trump unequivocally rejected Iran's response to a U.S.-drafted peace proposal. headlines.title: Ukraine’s Drone War Is Reaching Deep Into Russia’s Oil Heartland
headlines.summary: Russia’s Leningrad Oblast lies some 600 kilometers from the closest corner of Ukraine. But on April 15, its governor declared it a “frontline” region.
